# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for Lambda functions with access to S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: LambdaMultiServiceExecutionRole
      Description: IAM role for Lambda functions with access to multiple AWS services
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3AccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:*
                Resource:
                  - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-*
                  - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-*/*
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:ResourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:*
                Resource:
                  - !Sub arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${AWS::StackName}-*
                  - !Sub arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${AWS::StackName}-*/index/*
        - PolicyName: SQSAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:*
                Resource:
                  - !Sub arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}-*
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:ResourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
        - PolicyName: SNSAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:*
                Resource:
                  - !Sub arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}-*
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:ResourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                Resource:
                  - !Sub arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-*
                  - !Sub arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-*:*
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:PutMetricData
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    cloudwatch:namespace: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}/*
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      PermissionsBoundary: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/LambdaPermissionsBoundary
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: LambdaExecution
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  LambdaPermissionsBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: LambdaPermissionsBoundary
      Description: Permissions boundary to limit maximum permissions for Lambda roles
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowLambdaServices
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:*
              - dynamodb:*
              - sqs:*
              - sns:*
              - logs:*
              - cloudwatch:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyDangerousActions
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - iam:*
              - organizations:*
              - account:*
              - sts:AssumeRole
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyResourceExposure
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - s3:PutBucketPolicy
              - s3:PutBucketAcl
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - sns:AddPermission
              - sns:SetTopicAttributes
              - sqs:AddPermission
              - sqs:SetQueueAttributes
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

Outputs:
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRoleArn
  LambdaExecutionRoleName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRoleName
